coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Your friends are posting their VO2max workouts on Strava. You're being smart.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Zone 2 work: conversational pace. You should be able to talk in full sentences.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Consistency over intensity. Show up, do the work, repeat.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Your friends are doing threshold intervals. You're being smart.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Relax your grip. Drop your shoulders. Smooth pedaling.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Base training: the secret no one wants to do. That's why it works.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Low intensity, high volume. Building your engine from the ground up.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: This might feel too easy. That's the point. Patience builds power.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Zone 2: also known as 'why am I even here' pace.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Keep it comfortable. Nose breathing. Enjoy the ride.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: You're here because you want to be better. This is the price. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Seated at 90-95 rpm, 80% FTP. Focus on form and execution.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: You've got this. Stay focused and execute the plan.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: This seemed like a good idea at the time. Still is. Maybe.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Power: 80%, Cadence: 90-95 rpm, Position: Seated. Execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: This is race pace. If you can't hold this, you can't race. Simple as that.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: This is your aerobic threshold. Challenging but repeatable.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway through. You're not fading, you're adapting. Keep going.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Set 1. Your legs are politely requesting a break. Request denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Deep breath. Settle in. You can hold this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. This hurts because it's supposed to. Keep going.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1: 55% FTP. Seated. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: You've got this. Stay focused and execute the plan.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very  character-rich right now.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Stay smooth. Breathe deep. You've got this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 4. Yes, it hurts. That's the price of being faster than yesterday.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: You've accumulated 9min of VO2 work. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Rep 4 of 6 — you've done this before and you can do it again.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 4. Your legs are filing a formal complaint. Denied.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Every interval makes you stronger. Keep pushing.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: This seemed like a good idea at the time. Still is. Maybe.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Power: 55%, Cadence: 85-95 rpm, Position: Seated. Execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 5/6. This hurts because it's supposed to. Keep going.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Every interval makes you stronger. Keep pushing.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 5. Your legs have opinions. Noted.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Zone 2. Boring? Maybe. Effective? Absolutely. This is where champions are made.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: This should feel easy. If you're breathing hard, you're going too hard.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Not every workout needs to hurt. This is smart training.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: So easy you could do this all day. (Please don't.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Conversational pace. Save your matches for the hard days.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: You're here because you want to be better. This is the price. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 3: 60% FTP. Seated. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: You've got this. Stay focused and execute the plan.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very  character-rich right now.
